summary: Solid soundboard capture (B+ level) with a smoking second set highlighted by stellar Truckin', perfect Cassidy and an outstanding The Other One.
review: The recording is a solid B+‑grade soundboard tape; the levels run a bit high but remain clear enough to enjoy the performance. Musically the show shines – Phil belts out “Truckin’,” the first set opens with a flawless “Cassidy,” and the second set delivers a monster rendition of “The Other One.” Overall it’s an exciting, well‑performed concert despite minor recording quirks.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly positive (5, 5, 4 stars) and praise both the show and the recording; the performance is rated excellent while the B+ soundboard quality is good, yielding a weighted average around 4.6.

recording_quality.technical_notes: B+ grade – generally clear and balanced but with noticeably high levels that make the mix a bit bright.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for a perfect “Cassidy”; second set described as rocking the whole way through with highlights like “Truckin’” and an outstanding “The Other One.”

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil's vocal performance on “Truckin'” is highlighted as exceptional.
